data_quality: Source-derived workflow models from public construction, procurement, inspection, and closeout guidance. Values are operational defaults, not random synthetic data and not legal, engineering, valuation, title, payment, or permit advice.

sources.title: World Bank Project Procurement for Borrowers
sources.derived_signal: Contract management should include monitoring, evaluation, payment systems, and key-stage tracking.

sources.title: Project Management Plan Guidance for Major Projects
sources.derived_signal: Project controls should track contract administration, scope, cost, schedule, risk, quality, change management, claims, and reporting.

sources.title: Locally Administered Projects Manual Chapter 14: Project Close-out
sources.derived_signal: Final inspection follows completion of work and punch-list items; inspection teams identify corrective actions and required submittals.

sources.title: Public Works Project Closeout
sources.derived_signal: Closeout covers construction completion, financial administration, document archiving, and official turnover to the owner.

sources.title: Construction Closeout and Project Handover
sources.derived_signal: Competitive closeout products emphasize foldered documents, field checklists, and downloadable current project records.
